## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or screenshots.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Docker version: [e.g. 25.0.0]
- GPU: [e.g. NVIDIA RTX 3090, or "CPU only"]
- sift version / commit: [e.g. main@abc1234]

## Logs

```
# Relevant logs from: docker compose logs txtai-api
```

## Additional Context

Any other context (config changes, data volume, etc.).
